working_on: Routine task AUDIT-ETH (T-PHASE-5-AUDIT) — Ethics subdomain audit. SEP-anchored review of a deterministic 35%-density edge sample (k=24 of N=68) plus an edge-anchored node sample (~12 unique nodes), per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md. Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/ethics.md. Routine-mode is parametric-only — empirical-fortification branch prohibited per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout interactive session per ADR 0053).
declared_scope: Author engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/ethics.md as candidate-findings evidence for the 24-edge sample (k=24 of N=68 within-ethics edges from 0020_seed_ethics_part1.sql + 0026_seed_ethics_part1.sql; 35.3% density per master-plan §"Sample-size policy" AUDIT-ETH row) plus the ~12-node edge-anchored sample — verdict + SEP-anchored reasoning + confidence per element per the verbatim master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema. No other tracked files modified beyond the operational allowlist (current.json, current_plan.md, auto_target.json status fields, register_state.json, archive/S-0108.json, ENGINE_LOG.md, STATE.md). Parametric-only review; empirical-fortification branch prohibited for routine sessions until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout.

scope_delivery.explanation: Yes — AUDIT-ETH fully delivered: 24-edge + 12-node SEP-anchored review landed in ethics.md (320 lines) per the master-plan prompt templates and evidence-file schema; both task criteria pass; no descope, reorder, or deferral mid-session. Parametric-only review per master-plan §"Empirical-fortification branch" routine-mode prohibition; medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts get fortified at the closeout.

outcome_summary: Routine session S-0108 against T-PHASE-5-AUDIT task AUDIT-ETH landed a 24-edge + 12-node SEP-anchored review per the master-plan prompt templates at engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit.md (per S-0082 master-plan + S-0081 audit-warrant gate decision drawer in paideia/decisions; per S-0104 cross-bridge calibration; per S-0105 epistemology precedent; per S-0107 master-plan tightening that made the empirical-fortification branch routine-mode prohibition load-bearing). Single deliverable: engine/build_readiness/phase_5_production_audit_evidence/ethics.md (320 lines). Edge-verdict tally: 20 sound (83.3%), 1 defensible (E-5 motivational_internalism→expressivism — frameworks-vs-motivations dialectical-ordering pattern; clusters with S-0105 E-2 expertise→epistemic_dependence + E-20 bayesian_epistemology→dutch_book_argument; either order supportable), 1 reversed (E-16 animal_ethics→sentientism — sentientism is the foundational stance underwriting animal ethics per Bentham 1789 footnote + Singer 1975 argumentative move; canonical SEP framing runs sentientism→animal_ethics; pattern parallels S-0105 E-13 problem_of_induction→pyrrhonian_skepticism — both cases tradition-or-foundational-stance encoded as DOWNSTREAM of an application or specific subfield), 2 weak/redundant (E-17 virtue_ethics→moral_particularism redundant with E-15 normative_ethics→moral_particularism in this sample; E-20 moral_realism→moral_epistemology redundant with metaethics→moral_epistemology in the broader population — both species-level edges run parallel to broader-genus edges already in the graph). Node-verdict tally: 10 sound, 2 granularity-mismatch (N-4 moral_epistemology — summary explicitly framed as 'the branch of metaethics'; N-9 animal_ethics — summary explicitly framed as 'the branch of applied ethics'; both parallel S-0105 N-8 bayesian_epistemology granularity-mismatch and recurring graph-wide across applied-ethics subfield labels and metaethics sub-discipline labels). Substantive defects: 6 of 36 sampled elements (16.7%) — meaningfully higher than S-0105 epistemology 5.4% (plausibly because ethics has broader internal taxonomy: metaethics + normative + applied as three layers, each adding edges and granularity-mismatch surface) but well below S-0104 cross-bridge baseline 35.2% and consistent with the structural prediction that within-subdomain edges run cleaner than cross-domain bridges. Mid-sample expansion trigger (>60% at half-sample → expand to 50%) was nowhere near firing — half-sample defect rate (E-1 through E-12) was 1/12 = 8.3% (only E-5 defensible); substantive defects clustered in the second half (E-16 reversed + E-17 weak + E-20 weak); standard 35% density held. Three load-bearing aggregate patterns surfaced for the closeout disposition: (1) parallel-edge weak/redundant pairs (E-17, E-20) where a species-level within-subdomain edge runs alongside a broader-genus within-subdomain edge already in the graph — pattern may recur across subdomains and warrant a graph-wide cleanup pass; (2) sub-discipline-label-with-content granularity decision is graph-wide (animal_ethics + bioethics + environmental_ethics + business_ethics + technology_ethics + just_war_theory + moral_epistemology + bayesian_epistemology + virtue_epistemology + formal_epistemology), not per-node — closeout adjudicates at structural level rather than per-node disposition; (3) reversed-edge pattern (E-16) parallels S-0105 E-13. Empty `evidence` field uniform null across all 68 within-ethics edges (master-plan §T2-E pre-listed, confirmed graph-wide). No new gate-feasible audit-system-input class surfaced — the four pre-listed master-plan proposals plus S-0104's cross_bridge_pedagogical_direction_inconsistent_with_summary candidate were not extended (within-ethics data did not corroborate the cross-bridge-specific pattern). Parametric-only review per master-plan routine-mode prohibition (load-bearing until T1-A through T1-D close at the closeout per ADR 0053); medium-confidence + mutation-implying verdicts (E-5, E-16, E-17, E-20, N-4, N-9) get fortified at the closeout per the master-plan §"Forward pointers to closeout" fortification scope. 0 HANDOFF entries; 0 Issues filed; 0 hard-fails (validate.py 31 checks; soft-warns 372 = 366 Phase-5 missing_rigor_score carryover + 5 issue_collision + 1 adr_consequences_deliverable_audit; the issue_collision count of 5 vs S-0107 baseline of 4 is incidental keyword overlap with open issues, not a regression). AUDIT-ETH criteria pass (file_exists + validate_passes); marked complete in close commit. Next eligible task: AUDIT-MET (depends_on AUDIT-CB satisfied; metaphysics subdomain, 23 of 66 edges at 35% density). 8 subdomain audits + AUDIT-HT remain in T-PHASE-5-AUDIT before closeout.
